title: Spark K8s Distributed Lab
subtitle: Interactive distributed processing lab with real-time visualization
highlights: Interactive JupyterLab notebook with real-time K8s monitoring dashboard
Dynamic Allocation — Executor Pods auto-scale based on workload
Full ETL pipeline: CSV (S3) → Clean → Shuffle → Parquet
Canvas-based visualization of Pod lifecycle, data flow, and Shuffle operations
Spark History Server for reviewing DAG, Stage, and Shuffle metrics
